task_completion.description: Assign all unassigned Priority 1 bugs to 'Docker'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Priority 1 bugs with the 'Assigned To' field updated to 'Docker' (or showing the Docker user avatar) in the work item form or backlog list.

task_completion.description: Add the tag 'needs-owner' to the Priority 1 bugs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the tag 'needs-owner' applied to the Priority 1 bugs in the work item form or list view.

task_completion.description: Move Priority 1 bugs to the 'TailwindTraders\Backend API' area path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Area' field of Priority 1 bugs updated from 'Uncategorized' to 'TailwindTraders\Backend API' (or simply 'Backend API').

task_completion.description: Create a query that returns all Active bugs with Priority 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Azure DevOps query editor showing filter clauses for: Work Item Type = Bug, State = Active, and Priority = 1.

task_completion.description: Save the query as 'Critical Bug Backlog' under 'Shared Queries'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the query successfully saved with the name 'Critical Bug Backlog' and located specifically within the 'Shared Queries' folder in the Queries sidebar.

integrity.description: Agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Azure DevOps portal, rather than terminal commands or API scripts executing the changes.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application elements
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of clicking dropdowns, typing in fields, and navigating through the Azure DevOps menus (e.g., Boards, Queries, Work Items).

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The query criteria, tags, and area paths must be entered into the actual Azure DevOps input fields, not a notepad or separate text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: TailwindTraders. Target Area Path: 'TailwindTraders\Backend API'. Original/Wrong Area Path: 'TailwindTraders\Uncategorized'. Required Query Name: 'Critical Bug Backlog'. Query Location: 'Shared Queries'. Target Priority: 1. Target Work Item Type: 'Bug'.
